title: Yui being Reis mom gene donor
display_title: Yui being Reis mom gene donor
wikitext:
[]: Yui being Rei's mom (gene donor)             Quote Post by orcot » Sat Dec 04, 2021 1:52 am Can anyone help me? Where in the manga, OG tv series or rebuild is it stated that Yui is Rei's mother?

[]: Re: Yui being Rei's mom (gene donor)             Quote Post by Mr. Tines » Sat Dec 04, 2021 5:32 am Like most things, it's implicit rather than explicit, in an off-hand allusion to Rei in the context of trying to retrieve Yui, referring, in one translation, to "the product of my despair". Still trying to track down which episode that was, though.

[]: Re: Yui being Rei's mom (gene donor)             Quote Post by pwhodges » Sat Dec 04, 2021 9:22 am In NTE at the least, Fuyutsuki tells Shinji explicitly during the shogi game in Q . The series is never quite explicit; but there are hints, such as when Shinji notices that she seems to remind him of "a" (i.e. his?) mother. But the "Red Cross Book" which was published for the first releases of End of Evangelion has the quote: "[Rei's] body was actually salvaged from what was left behind of Yui's body inside EVA." I haven't checked in the manga yet.

[]: Re: Yui being Rei's mom (gene donor)             Quote Post by orcot » Sat Dec 04, 2021 11:45 am wow thanks I've totally missed the rebuild ones. Do you think Fuyutsuki had any reason to lie here? Mr times the product of my despair was stated by fuyutsuki right I believe it's the episode where he get's interrogated I might watch it this evening. (on a sidenote do you consider Yui to be Rei's mother or her father as Yui donated genetic material but didn't carry/gestate Rei) Also does this question matter in some way (all the pilots mothers are inside the eva's so the difference seem somewhat relevant)

[]: Re: Yui being Rei's mom (gene donor)             Quote Post by Lickitung » Mon Dec 06, 2021 11:56 am Mr. Tines wrote: Still trying to track down which episode that was, though.

[]: Re: Yui being Rei's mom (gene donor)             Quote Post by sithsauron » Mon Dec 06, 2021 4:11 pm Do you think those lower bodies dangling under the torso of Lilith show how Rei clones are produced?

[]: Re: Yui being Rei's mom (gene donor)             Quote Post by Mr. Tines » Mon Dec 06, 2021 5:56 pm ^ That's an idea that's been kicked around for many years, with, of course, no conclusion either way. Lickitung wrote: Episode 23 ( director's cut) just after Rei's death

[]: Re: Yui being Rei's mom (gene donor)             Quote Post by orcot » Tue Dec 07, 2021 2:49 pm sithsauron wrote: Do you think those lower bodies dangling under the torso of Lilith show how Rei clones are produced?

[]: Re: Yui being Rei's mom (gene donor)             Quote Post by sithsauron » Wed Dec 08, 2021 4:11 pm orcot wrote: probably not , if so their would be many more swimming in the LCL sea , if they caught only a couple Gendo would have no problem replacing the ones Ritsuko destroyed.
